---
title: "VisualMath"
subtitle: "Interactive, browser-based visualizations of numerical methods."
listing:
  contents: ["computational-math/root-finding/*/index.qmd", "computational-math/piecewise-interpolation/*/index.qmd", "computational-math/differential-equations/*/index.qmd", "discrete-math/sperners-lemma/*/index.qmd"]
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---
